title: 3 Unsolvable Mysteries of the Earth

segments.text: The Bermuda Triangle reports over a thousand disappearances.
Yet the cause is still unexplainable.
First, the Devil's Kettle—one side flows in, the other vanishes.
Where does the water go? No one knows.
Next, magnetic anomalies across the globe, defying explanation.
They interfere with compasses, leaving us puzzled.
Finally, the Tunguska event, a massive explosion in 1908.
Yet no impact crater or clear source has been found.
How many other mysteries lie beneath our feet?
Follow for mysteries we still can't explain.

description: Our planet is full of unsolved enigmas. Follow for daily mysteries! 🌍
